'''pazozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadhead|deadhead]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadhead|deadhead]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pazozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzezeth|pæzezeth]] || [[word:pæzezej|pæzezej]] || [[word:pæzezesh|pæzezesh]] || [[word:pæzeze|pæzeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazozozoth|pazozozoth]] || [[word:pazozozoj|pazozozoj]] || [[word:pazozozosh|pazozozosh]] || [[word:pazozozo|pazozozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazozoth|pazozoth]] || [[word:pazozoj|pazozoj]] || [[word:pazozosh|pazozosh]] || [[word:pazozo|pazozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazofzoth|pazofzoth]] || [[word:pazofzoj|pazofzoj]] || [[word:pazofzosh|pazofzosh]] || [[word:pazofzof|pazofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazozotho|pazozotho]] || [[word:pazozojo|pazozojo]] || [[word:pazozosho|pazozosho]] || [[word:pazozoko|pazozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazozoth|pazozoth]] || [[word:pazozoj|pazozoj]] || [[word:pazozosh|pazozosh]] || [[word:pazozo|pazozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazozothol|pazozothol]] || [[word:pazozojol|pazozojol]] || [[word:pazozoshol|pazozoshol]] || [[word:pazozokol|pazozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazozothotho|pazozothotho]] || [[word:pazozojojo|pazozojojo]] || [[word:pazozoshosho|pazozoshosho]] || [[word:pazozoko|pazozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazozothon|pazozothon]] || [[word:pazozojon|pazozojon]] || [[word:pazozoshon|pazozoshon]] || [[word:pazozokon|pazozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazozothoro|pazozothoro]] || [[word:pazozojoro|pazozojoro]] || [[word:pazozoshoro|pazozoshoro]] || [[word:pazozokoro|pazozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
